DateTime(2025, 9, 1),\n    MaxTeams = 10,\n    Description = \"Liga za studente informatike\"\n};\n\n// --- Fantasy timovi za Ligu 1 (4 tima) ---\nvar team1 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 1, Name = players[6] });\n\nvar team2 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 2, Name = \"Salah Stars\", OwnerName = \"Ana\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 8, 3), Budget = 8.5, TotalPoints = 485, League = league1 };\nteam2.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[2], players[3], players[5], players[11] });\n\nvar team3 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 3, Name = \"Palmer XI\", OwnerName = \"Ivan\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 8, 3), Budget = 12.0, TotalPoints = 510, League = league1 };\nteam3.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[8], players[9], players[7], players[12] });\n\nvar team4 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 4, Name = \"Red Devils\", OwnerName = \"Petra\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 8, 5), Budget = 15.0, TotalPoints = 430, League = league1 };\nteam4.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[10], players[14], players[13], players[3] });\n\nleague1.Teams.AddRange(new[] { team1, team2, team3, team4 });\n\n// --- Fantasy timovi za Ligu 2 (3 tima) ---\nvar team5 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 5, Name = \"City Killers\", OwnerName = \"Luka\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 8, 11), Budget = 10.0, TotalPoints = 475, League = league2 };\nteam5.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[0], players[12], players[8], players[5] });\n\nvar team6 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 6, Name = \"Golden Boot\", OwnerName = \"Maja\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 8, 12), Budget = 7.0, TotalPoints = 460, League = league2 };\nteam6.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[2], players[9], players[1], players[6] });\n\nvar team7 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 7, Name = \"Clean Sheet FC\", OwnerName = \"Dario\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 8, 13), Budget = 20.0, TotalPoints = 390, League = league2 };\nteam7.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[4], players[3], players[7], players[14] });\n\nleague2.Teams.AddRange(new[] { team5, team6, team7 });\n\n// --- Fantasy timovi za Ligu 3 (3 tima) ---\nvar team8 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 8, Name = \"FESB United\", OwnerName = \"Ante\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 9, 2), Budget = 6.0, TotalPoints = 500, League = league3 };\nteam8.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[0], players[2], players[5], players[3] });\n\nvar team9 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 9, Name = \"Debug FC\", OwnerName = \"Josipa\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 9, 2), Budget = 9.0, TotalPoints = 445, League = league3 };\nteam9.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[8], players[10], players[12], players[4] });\n\nvar team10 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 10, Name = \"Stack Overflow XI\", OwnerName = \"Toni\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 9, 3), Budget = 11.0, TotalPoints = 410, League = league3 };\nteam10.Players.AddRange(new[] { players[9], players[13], players[11], players[7] });\n\nleague3.Teams.AddRange(new[] { team8, team9, team10 });\n\n// N-N veza: igraďż˝ďż˝i referenciraju natrag na timove\nvar allTeams = new List<FantasyTeam> { team1, team2, team3, team4, team5, team6, team7, team8, team9, team10 };\nforeach (var team in allTeams)\n{\n    foreach (var player in team.Players)\n    {\n        if (!player.FantasyTeams.Contains(team))\n            player.FantasyTeams.Add(team);\n    }\n}\n\nvar allLeagues = new List<League> { league1, league2, league3 };\n\n// --- Transferi ---\nleague1.Transfers.AddRange(new[]\n{\n    new Transfer { Id = 1, Player = players[14], FromTeam = team4, ToTeam = team1, TransferDate = new DateTime(2025, 10, 5), Price = 50.0, Status = TransferStatus.Accepted },\n    new Transfer { Id = 2, Player = players[8], FromTeam = null, ToTeam = team3, TransferDate = new DateTime(2025, 10, 10), Price = 110.0, Status = TransferStatus.Accepted },\n    new Transfer { Id = 3, Player = players[5], FromTeam = team2, ToTeam = team1, TransferDate = new DateTime(2025, 11, 1), Price = 120.0, Status = TransferStatus.Rejected },\n    new Transfer { Id = 4, Player = players[9], FromTeam = team3, ToTeam = team2, TransferDate = new DateTime(2025, 12, 15), Price = 95.0, Status = TransferStatus.Pending },\n});\n\nleague2.Transfers.AddRange(new[]\n{\n    new Transfer { Id = 5, Player = players[13], FromTeam = null, ToTeam = team5, TransferDate = new DateTime(2025, 10, 20), Price = 65.0, Status = TransferStatus.Accepted },\n    new Transfer { Id = 6, Player = players[1], FromTeam = team6, ToTeam = team7, TransferDate = new DateTime(2025, 11, 5), Price = 75.0, Status = TransferStatus.Cancelled },\n});\n\n// --- Gameweekovi s performansama ---\nvar gameweek1 = new Gameweek\n{\n    Id = 1, WeekNumber = 1,\n    StartDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 16),\n    EndDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 18),\n};\ngameweek1.Performances.AddRange(new[]\n{\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 1, Player = players[0], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 17), Opponent = \"Chelsea\", Goals = 2, Assists = 0, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 13 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 2, Player = players[1], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 17), Opponent = \"Chelsea\", Goals = 0, Assists = 2, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 9 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 3, Player = players[2], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 17), Opponent = \"Wolves\", Goals = 1, Assists = 1, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 85, PointsEarned = 10 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 4, Player = players[4], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 17), Opponent = \"Wolves\", Goals = 0, Assists = 0, CleanSheet = true, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 8 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 5, Player = players[8], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 18), Opponent = \"Everton\", Goals = 3, Assists = 1, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 1, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 18 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 6, Player = players[5], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 18), Opponent = \"Forest\", Goals = 1, Assists = 0, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 7 },\n});\n\nvar gameweek2 = new Gameweek\n{\n    Id = 2, WeekNumber = 2,\n    StartDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 23),\n    EndDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 25),\n};\ngameweek2.Performances.AddRange(new[]\n{\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 7, Player = players[0], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 23), Opponent = \"Newcastle\", Goals = 1, Assists = 1, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 10 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 8, Player = players[3], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 24), Opponent = \"Brentford\", Goals = 1, Assists = 0, CleanSheet = true, YellowCards = 1, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 12 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 9, Player = players[9], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 24), Opponent = \"Man City\", Goals = 0, Assists = 0, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 1, MinutesPlayed = 35, PointsEarned = -1 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 10, Player = players[13], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 25), Opponent = \"West Ham\", Goals = 2, Assists = 1, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 15 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 11, Player = players[14], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 25), Opponent = \"Leicester\", Goals = 1, Assists = 2, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 0, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 88, PointsEarned = 12 },\n    new MatchPerformance { Id = 12, Player = players[10], MatchDate = new DateTime(2025, 8, 24), Opponent = \"Brighton\", Goals = 0, Assists = 1, CleanSheet = false, YellowCards = 1, RedCards = 0, MinutesPlayed = 90, PointsEarned = 4 },\n});\n\nvar allGameweeks = new List<Gameweek> { gameweek1, gameweek2 };\nvar allPerformances = allGameweeks.SelectMany(gw => gw.Performances).ToList();\nvar allTransfers = allLeagues.SelectMany(l => l.Transfers).ToList();\n\n// --- Standings ---\nvar standingsLeague1 = league1.Teams\n    .OrderByDescending(t => t.TotalPoints)\n    .Select((t, index) => new Standing { Rank = index + 1, Team = t, Points = t.TotalPoints, GamesPlayed = 20 })\n    .ToList();\n\n// =============================================\n// LINQ UPITI\n// =============================================\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"========================================\");\nConsole.WriteLine(\"  FANTASY FOOTBALL - LINQ UPITI\");\nConsole.WriteLine(\"========================================\\n\");\n\n// 1. Svi napadaďż˝ďż˝i koji su zabili vi+ďż˝e od 15 golova\nConsole.WriteLine(\"1. Napadaďż˝ďż˝i s vi+ďż˝e od 15 golova:\");\nvar topForwards = players\n    .Where(p => p.Position == Position.Forward \u0026\u0026 p.Goals > 15)\n    .OrderByDescending(p => p.Goals);\nforeach (var p in topForwards)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {p.FullName} ({p.Club}) - {p.Goals} golova\");\n\n// 2. Top 5 igraďż˝ďż˝a po ukupnim bodovima\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n2. Top 5 igraďż˝ďż˝a po bodovima:\");\nvar top5Players = players\n    .OrderByDescending(p => p.TotalPoints)\n    .Take(5);\nforeach (var p in top5Players)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {p.FullName} - {p.TotalPoints} bodova ({p.Position})\");\n\n// 3. Prosjeďż˝ďż˝na tr+ďż˝i+ďż˝na vrijednost igraďż˝ďż˝a po poziciji\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n3. Prosjeďż˝ďż˝na tr+ďż˝i+ďż˝na vrijednost po poziciji (mil. ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝):\");\nvar avgValueByPosition = players\n    .GroupBy(p => p.Position)\n    .Select(g => new { Position = g.Key, AvgValue = g.Average(p => p.MarketValue) })\n    .OrderByDescending(x => x.AvgValue);\nforeach (var x in avgValueByPosition)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {x.Position}: {x.AvgValue:F1}\");\n\n// 4. Ljestvica lige 1 - timovi poredani po bodovima\nConsole.WriteLine($\"\\n4. Ljestvica - {league1.Name}:\");\nforeach (var s in standingsLeague1)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {s.Rank}. {s.Team.Name} ({s.Team.OwnerName}) - {s.Points} bodova\");\n\n// 5. Svi prihvaďż˝ďż˝eni transferi i njihova ukupna vrijednost\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n5. Prihvaďż˝ďż˝eni transferi:\");\nvar acceptedTransfers = allTransfers\n    .Where(t => t.Status == TransferStatus.Accepted);\nforeach (var t in acceptedTransfers)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {t.Player.FullName} -> {t.ToTeam.Name} za {t.Price} mil. ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ ({t.TransferDate:dd.MM.yyyy.})\");\nConsole.WriteLine($\"   Ukupna vrijednost: {acceptedTransfers.Sum(t => t.Price)} mil. ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝\");\n\n// 6. Igraďż˝ďż˝ koji je u najvi+ďż˝e fantasy timova (N-N veza)\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n6. Najpopularniji igraďż˝ďż˝i (u najvi+ďż˝e timova):\");\nvar mostPopular = players\n    .OrderByDescending(p => p.FantasyTeams.Count)\n    .Take(3);\nforeach (var p in mostPopular)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {p.FullName} - u {p.FantasyTeams.Count} tima/timova\");\n\n// 7. Gameweek s najvi+ďż˝e golova\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n7. Golovi po gameweeku:\");\nvar goalsPerGameweek = allGameweeks\n    .Select(gw => new { gw.WeekNumber, TotalGoals = gw.Performances.Sum(p => p.Goals) })\n    .OrderByDescending(x => x.TotalGoals);\nforeach (var gw in goalsPerGameweek)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   Gameweek {gw.WeekNumber}: {gw.TotalGoals} golova\");\n\n// 8. Igraďż˝ďż˝i koji imaju i golove i asistencije (dual contributors)\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n8. Igraďż˝ďż˝i s golovima I asistencijama (dual contributors):\");\nvar dualContributors = players\n    .Where(p => p.Goals > 0 \u0026\u0026 p.Assists > 0)\n    .OrderByDescending(p => p.Goals + p.Assists);\nforeach (var p in dualContributors)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {p.FullName} - {p.Goals}G / {p.Assists}A\");\n\n// 9. Tim s najskupljim sastavom u ligi 1\nConsole.WriteLine($\"\\n9. Najskuplji sastav u {league1.Name}:\");\nvar mostExpensiveTeam = league1.Teams\n    .OrderByDescending(t => t.Players.Sum(p => p.MarketValue))\n    .First();\nConsole.WriteLine($\"   {mostExpensiveTeam.Name} - ukupna vrijednost: {mostExpensiveTeam.Players.Sum(p => p.MarketValue)} mil. ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝\");\n\n// 10. Lige koje imaju vi+ďż˝e od 3 tima\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n10. Lige s vi+ďż˝e od 3 tima:\");\nvar largeLeagues = allLeagues\n    .Where(l => l.Teams.Count > 3);\nforeach (var l in largeLeagues)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {l.Name} - {l.Teams.Count} timova\");\n\n// 11. Igraďż˝ďż˝i roďż˝ďż˝eni nakon 2000. godine (mladi talenti)\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n11. Mladi talenti (roďż˝ďż˝eni nakon 2000.):\");\nvar youngTalents = players\n    .Where(p => p.DateOfBirth.Year > 2000)\n    .OrderBy(p => p.DateOfBirth);\nforeach (var p in youngTalents)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {p.FullName} ({p.DateOfBirth:dd.MM.yyyy.}) - {p.Club}, {p.TotalPoints} bodova\");\n\n// 12. Performanse u gameweeku 1 gdje je igraďż˝ďż˝ dobio vi+ďż˝e od 10 bodova\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n12. Najbolje performanse u Gameweek 1 (10+ bodova):\");\nvar bestPerformances = gameweek1.Performances\n    .Where(mp => mp.PointsEarned >= 10)\n    .OrderByDescending(mp => mp.PointsEarned);\nforeach (var mp in bestPerformances)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {mp.Player.FullName} vs {mp.Opponent}: {mp.Goals}G {mp.Assists}A - {mp.PointsEarned} bodova\");\n\n// 13. Broj pending transfera po ligi\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n13. Pending transferi po ligi:\");\nvar pendingPerLeague = allLeagues\n    .Select(l => new { l.Name, PendingCount = l.Transfers.Count(t => t.Status == TransferStatus.Pending) })\n    .Where(x => x.PendingCount > 0);\nforeach (var x in pendingPerLeague)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {x.Name}: {x.PendingCount} pending\");\n\n// 14. Golmani poredani po broju clean sheetova\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n14. Golmani - clean sheet rang lista:\");\nvar goalkeepers = players\n    .Where(p => p.Position == Position.Goalkeeper)\n    .OrderByDescending(p => p.CleanSheets);\nforeach (var gk in goalkeepers)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {gk.FullName} ({gk.Club}) - {gk.CleanSheets} clean sheets\");\n\n// 15. Ukupan broj igraďż˝ďż˝a po klubu u fantasy sustavu\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n15. Broj igraďż˝ďż˝a po klubu:\");\nvar playersPerClub = players\n    .GroupBy(p => p.Club)\n    .Select(g => new { Club = g.Key, Count = g.Count() })\n    .OrderByDescending(x => x.Count);\nforeach (var x in playersPerClub)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"   {x.Club}: {x.Count} igraďż˝ďż˝a\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n========================================\\n\");\n\napp.Run();\n"
                   },
    "tool_use_id":  "toolu_01XtRfVCaX8wY4pr82G4HxWZ"

    "permission_mode":  "acceptEdits",
    "hook_event_name":  "PreToolUse",
    "tool_name":  "Glob",

    "permission_mode":  "default",
    "hook_event_name":  "PreToolUse",
    "tool_name":  "Write",
    "tool_input":  {
                       "file_path":  "c:\\Users\\marijan.varivoda\\source\\FantasyFootball\\.claude\\agents\\ux-designer.md",
                       "content":  "---\nname: ux-designer\ndescription: Specijalizirani UX/UI agent za FantasyFootball projekt. Koristi ga proaktivno kada se generiraju Razor Views (.cshtml), CSS stilovi, Bootstrap komponente, layout promjene, ili bilo koji frontend/UI kod.\ntools: Read, Glob, Grep, Write, Edit, Bash\nmodel: sonnet\n---\n\nTi si senior UX/UI dizajner i frontend developer specijaliziran za ASP.NET MVC aplikacije s Bootstrap frameworkom.\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- ASP.NET MVC s Razor Views (.cshtml)\n- Bootstrap 5 (ukljuďż˝ďż˝en putem wwwroot/lib/bootstrap/)\n- jQuery (za interaktivnost)\n- Custom CSS u wwwroot/css/site.css\n- Layout sustav: Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml\n\n## Stilski Principi\n\n### Vizualni Identitet\n- Koristiti sportsku, modernu estetiku prikladnu za fantasy football aplikaciju\n- Primarna paleta boja: zelena (#198754 - teren), tamno plava (#0d1b2a - dres), bijela za pozadinu\n- Accent boja: narancasta (#fd7e14) za highlights i CTA elemente\n- Font: koristiti Bootstrap defaulte (system font stack) za konzistentnost\n\n### Layout Principi\n- Mobile-first pristup - uvijek krenuti od najmanjeg ekrana\n- Koristiti Bootstrap grid sustav (container > row > col-*) za sve layoute\n- Maksimalna sirina sadrzaja: container (1320px) za citljivost\n- Vertikalni ritam: koristiti spacing utilities (mb-3, mt-4, py-5) konzistentno\n- Svaki View MORA imati jasnu vizualnu hijerarhiju: naslov > podnaslov > sadrzaj\n\n### Komponente\n- Kartice (Bootstrap Cards) su primarna komponenta za prikaz igraca i timova\n- Tablice koristiti za statistiku i rangiranje (table, table-striped, table-hover)\n- Forme koristiti Bootstrap form klase s validacijom (asp-validation-for)\n- Navigacija: navbar u _Layout.cshtml, breadcrumbs za dublje stranice\n- Gumbi: btn-primary za glavne akcije, btn-outline-secondary za sporedne\n\n### Pristupacnost (Accessibility)\n- Svaka slika MORA imati alt atribut\n- Forme MORAJU koristiti <label> povezan s inputom\n- Interaktivni elementi moraju biti dostupni tipkovnicom\n- Koristiti ARIA atribute gdje je semanticki HTML nedovoljan\n- Kontrast boja mora zadovoljavati WCAG AA standard (4.5:1 za tekst)\n\n## Pravila za Generiranje UI Koda\n\n1. **Prije pisanja koda** - procitaj postojeci _Layout.cshtml i site.css da osiguras konzistentnost\n2. **Razor sintaksa** - koristi Tag Helpere (asp-controller, asp-action, asp-for) umjesto HTML helpera\n3. **Responsive** - svaki novi View mora izgledati dobro na 320px, 768px, i 1200px+\n4. **Partial Views** - za komponente koje se ponavljaju kreiraj Partial View u Views/Shared/\n5. **CSS** - nove stilove dodaj u wwwroot/css/site.css, ne inline stilove\n6. **JavaScript** - minimizirati JS, preferirati Bootstrap ugradjene komponente (collapse, modal, tooltip)\n7. **Validacija** - koristiti server-side validaciju (DataAnnotations) + client-side (jquery-validation-unobtrusive)\n\n## Checklist Prije Zavrsetka\n\n- [ ] HTML je semanticki (header, main, nav, section, article, footer)\n- [ ] Bootstrap klase su pravilno koristene (nema custom CSS za nesto sto Bootstrap vec rjesava)\n- [ ] Responsive na svim breakpointima\n- [ ] Forme imaju validaciju\n- [ ] Slike imaju alt tekst\n- [ ] Navigacija je azurirana ako je dodan novi View\n"
                   },
    "tool_use_id":  "toolu_01R96stiNsmA1psDC8EjEZMq"
}

za komponente koje se ponavljaju kreiraj Partial View u Views/Shared/\n5. **CSS** - nove stilove dodaj u wwwroot/css/site.css, ne inline stilove\n6. **JavaScript** - minimizirati JS, preferirati Bootstrap ugradjene komponente (collapse, modal, tooltip)\n7. **Validacija** - koristiti server-side validaciju (DataAnnotations) + client-side (jquery-validation-unobtrusive)\n\n## Checklist Prije Zavrsetka\n\n- [ ] HTML je semanticki (header, main, nav, section, article, footer)\n- [ ] Bootstrap klase su pravilno koristene (nema custom CSS za nesto sto Bootstrap vec rjesava)\n- [ ] Responsive na svim breakpointima\n- [ ] Forme imaju validaciju\n- [ ] Slike imaju alt tekst\n- [ ] Navigacija je azurirana ako je dodan novi View",
                       "new_string":  "Ti si senior UX/UI dizajner i frontend developer specijaliziran za ASP.NET MVC aplikacije.\nTVOJ GLAVNI CILJ: kreirati vizualno JEDINSTVEN dizajn koji se NE smije izgledati kao default Bootstrap template.\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- ASP.NET MVC s Razor Views (.cshtml)\n- Bootstrap 5 (ukljuďż˝ďż˝en putem wwwroot/lib/bootstrap/) ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ koristiti SAMO kao grid/utility osnovu\n- jQuery (za interaktivnost)\n- Custom CSS u wwwroot/css/site.css ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ OVO je glavni stilski file\n- Layout sustav: Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml\n\n## KRITICNO: Anti-Bootstrap-Default Pravila\n\nNIKADA ne koristiti default Bootstrap izgled. Svaki element MORA biti vizualno customiziran:\n- ZABRANJENO: default btn-primary plavi gumb, default card s bijelom pozadinom, default navbar izgled\n- OBAVEZNO: svaki Bootstrap element MORA imati custom CSS override u site.css\n- Bootstrap koristiti ISKLJUCIVO za grid (row/col), spacing utilities (m-*, p-*), i responsive breakpointe\n- Sav vizualni stil (boje, sjene, borderovi, fontovi, animacije) MORA doci iz custom CSS-a\n\n## Stilski Principi\n\n### Vizualni Identitet ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ \"Dark Stadium\" Tema\n- Tamna pozadina: #0a0e17 (gotovo crna s plavim tonom) ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ NE bijela\n- Surface boja: #141b2d (kartice, paneli) s rubom 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)\n- Primarna accent: #00f5a0 (neon zelena ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ asocijacija na teren pod reflektorima)\n- Sekundarna accent: #7b61ff (ljubicasta ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ premium/fantasy osjecaj)\n- Opasnost/crvena: #ff4757 za negativne statistike\n- Tekst: #e2e8f0 (svetlo siva), #64748b (prigusena za sekundarne info)\n- NIKADA koristiti cisti bijeli (#fff) za tekst ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ preostar je na tamnoj pozadini\n\n### Tipografija\n- Naslovi: font-weight 700-800, letter-spacing: -0.02em, text-transform: uppercase za H1\n- Brojevi/statistike: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums, font-size veci od okolnog teksta\n- Koristiti CSS custom properties (--ff-font-heading, --ff-font-body) za konzistentnost\n\n### Efekti i Detalji (ovo cini dizajn unique)\n- Kartice: background glassmorphism efekt ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ backdrop-filter: blur(12px), poluprozirna pozadina\n- Hover na karticama: transform: translateY(-4px), box-shadow s accent bojom (0 8px 32px rgba(0,245,160,0.15))\n- Gumbi: gradient pozadina (linear-gradient), border-radius: 8px, NIKADA default Bootstrap stil\n- Primarni CTA gumb: background linear-gradient(135deg, #00f5a0, #00d9f5), crni tekst, bold\n- Tablice: bez default Bootstrap striping ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ koristiti subtle alternating row s rgba pozadinom\n- Badges/tagovi za pozicije igraca: pill oblik, poluprozirna pozadina accent boje\n- Loading stanja: skeleton animacije umjesto spinnera\n- Tranzicije: transition: all 0.2s ease na svim interaktivnim elementima\n- Ikonice: koristiti Bootstrap Icons (bi-*) ili emoji za vizualni interes\n\n### Layout Principi\n- Mobile-first pristup ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ uvijek krenuti od najmanjeg ekrana\n- Koristiti Bootstrap grid sustav (container > row > col-*) za strukturu\n- Full-width hero sekcije s gradient overlay na vrhu stranica\n- Kartice u gridu: gap umjesto Bootstrap guttera gdje je moguce\n- Dashboard-style layout za statistiku: sidebar + main content na desktopu\n- Vertikalni ritam: konzistentni spacing koristeci CSS custom properties (--ff-space-sm, --ff-space-md, --ff-space-lg)\n\n### Komponente ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ Custom Dizajn\n- **Player Card**: tamna kartica s igracevom pozicijom kao neon badge, hover glow efekt\n- **Stats Table**: tamna pozadina, accent-colored header, hover highlight na redu\n- **Navbar**: tamna, blur backdrop, logo s accent bojom, NIKADA default Bootstrap navbar stil\n- **Forme**: tamni inputi s border-bottom umjesto box bordera, focus glow u accent boji\n- **Modali**: tamna pozadina, glassmorphism efekt, custom close button\n- **Footer**: minimalan, tamni, s accent linijom na vrhu\n\n### Pristupacnost (Accessibility)\n- Svaka slika MORA imati alt atribut\n- Forme MORAJU koristiti <label> povezan s inputom\n- Interaktivni elementi moraju biti dostupni tipkovnicom\n- Koristiti ARIA atribute gdje je semanticki HTML nedovoljan\n- Kontrast boja mora zadovoljavati WCAG AA standard (4.5:1 za tekst) ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ testirati neon na tamnoj pozadini\n\n## Pravila za Generiranje UI Koda\n\n1. **Prije pisanja koda** - procitaj postojeci _Layout.cshtml i site.css da osiguras konzistentnost\n2. **Custom CSS PRVO** - svaki novi View MORA imati odgovarajuce custom stilove u site.css PRIJE HTML-a\n3. **CSS Custom Properties** - definiraj boje i spacing kao varijable u :root selektoru site.css\n4. **Razor sintaksa** - koristi Tag Helpere (asp-controller, asp-action, asp-for) umjesto HTML helpera\n5. **Responsive** - svaki novi View mora izgledati dobro na 320px, 768px, i 1200px+\n6. **Partial Views** - za komponente koje se ponavljaju kreiraj Partial View u Views/Shared/\n7. **NIKADA inline stilove** - sve u site.css s jasnim BEM-like imenima (.ff-player-card, .ff-stats-table)\n8. **JavaScript** - minimizirati JS, preferirati CSS animacije i Bootstrap ugradjene komponente\n9. **Validacija** - koristiti server-side validaciju (DataAnnotations) + client-side (jquery-validation-unobtrusive)\n\n## Checklist Prije Zavrsetka\n\n- [ ] Izgleda li DRUGACIJE od default Bootstrap template-a? (najvazniji check!)\n- [ ] Custom CSS varijable definirane u :root?\n- [ ] Svaki element ima custom stil ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ nista ne izgleda \"out of the box\"\n- [ ] HTML je semanticki (header, main, nav, section, article, footer)\n- [ ] Responsive na svim breakpointima\n- [ ] Hover/focus stanja definirana za sve interaktivne elemente\n- [ ] Forme imaju validaciju\n- [ ] Slike imaju alt tekst\n- [ ] Navigacija je azurirana ako je dodan novi View",
                       "replace_all":  false
                   },
    "tool_use_id":  "toolu_01MSBq6tL57vBgymbkxdqmf7"

t.League = league1; }\n            foreach (var t in teams.Where(t => t.Id >= 5 \u0026\u0026 t.Id <= 7)) { league2.Teams.Add(t); t.League = league2; }\n            foreach (var t in teams.Where(t => t.Id >= 8 \u0026\u0026 t.Id <= 10)) { league3.Teams.Add(t); t.League = league3; }\n\n            // Assign transfers to leagues\n            foreach (var tr in transfers.Where(t => t.Id >= 1 \u0026\u0026 t.Id <= 4)) league1.Transfers.Add(tr);\n            foreach (var tr in transfers.Where(t => t.Id >= 5 \u0026\u0026 t.Id <= 6)) league2.Transfers.Add(tr);\n\n            _leagues = new List<League> { league1, league2, league3 };\n        }\n\n        public List<League> GetAll() => _leagues;\n        public League? GetById(int id) => _leagues.FirstOrDefault(l => l.Id == id);\n    }\n}\n"
                   },

HttpContext.TraceIdentifier });\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
                   },

Ovo je fantasy football app s \"Dark Stadium\" temom ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ tamna pozadina, neon zeleni accenti, glassmorphism efekti. NE SMIJE izgledati kao default Bootstrap template.\n\n## Projekt info\n- Radni direktorij: c:/Users/marijan.varivoda/source/FantasyFootball\n- ASP.NET MVC, Razor Views, Bootstrap 5, jQuery\n- Controlleri su vec kreirani: HomeController, PlayerController, LeagueController, FantasyTeamController, GameweekController, TransferController\n- Svaki controller ima Index() i Details(int id) akcije\n- View direktoriji su vec kreirani\n\n## Sto trebas napraviti (SVE):\n\n### 1. Custom CSS u wwwroot/css/site.css\nKompletna \"Dark Stadium\" tema:\n- CSS custom properties u :root (:root varijable za boje, spacing, fontove)\n- Tamna pozadina #0a0e17, surface #141b2d\n- Accent: #00f5a0 (neon zelena), #7b61ff (ljubicasta)\n- Tekst: #e2e8f0 (primarni), #64748b (sekundarni)\n- Custom navbar (tamna, blur backdrop)\n- Custom kartice s glassmorphism efektom (backdrop-filter: blur)\n- Custom tablice (tamne, accent header)\n- Custom gumbi (gradient, ne default Bootstrap)\n- Hover/transition efekti na svemu\n- Player position badges (pill oblik, accent boje)\n- BEM-like klase s ff- prefiksom (.ff-card, .ff-table, .ff-badge-position, itd.)\n- Responsive\n\n### 2. Layout: Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml\n- Tamna navbar s neon zelenim logom \"FantasyFootball\"\n- Navigacijski linkovi: Home, Players, Teams, Leagues, Gameweeks, Transfers\n- Tamni footer s accent linijom na vrhu\n- Bootstrap Icons CDN link u head\n\n### 3. Views za Player (Views/Player/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List<FantasyFootball.Models.Player>\n- Naslov \"Players\"\n- Karticni grid prikaz (3 kolone desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobitel)\n- Svaka kartica: ime, klub, pozicija badge, golovi/asisti, bodovi, market value\n- Link na Details\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model FantasyFootball.Models.Player\n- Breadcrumb: Home > Players > [ime]\n- Hero sekcija s imenom, klubom, pozicijom\n- Stats grid: Goals, Assists, Clean Sheets, Total Points, Market Value\n- Lista fantasy timova u kojima je igrac (player.FantasyTeams) s linkovima na FantasyTeam/Details\n\n### 4. Views za League (Views/League/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List<FantasyFootball.Models.League>\n- Kartice za svaku ligu: ime, sezona, opis, broj timova/max timova\n- Link na Details\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model FantasyFootball.Models.League\n- Breadcrumb\n- Info sekcija (sezona, opis, kreirana)\n- Tablica standings (rangiranje timova po bodovima) - league.Teams orderirano po TotalPoints desc\n- Lista transfera u ligi (league.Transfers) s linkovima\n\n### 5. Views za FantasyTeam (Views/FantasyTeam/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List<FantasyFootball.Models.FantasyTeam>\n- Kartice: ime tima, vlasnik, liga, budget, bodovi\n- Link na Details\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model FantasyFootball.Models.FantasyTeam\n- Breadcrumb\n- Hero s imenom tima, vlasnikom, ligom (link na League/Details)\n- Stats: Budget, Total Points\n- Tablica igraca u timu (team.Players) s linkovima na Player/Details\n\n### 6. Views za Gameweek (Views/Gameweek/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List<FantasyFootball.Models.Gameweek>\n- Kartice za svaki gameweek: broj tjedna, datumi, ukupni golovi, broj performansi\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model FantasyFootball.Models.Gameweek\n- Breadcrumb\n- Info: Week number, datumi\n- Tablica performansi (gameweek.Performances): igrac, protivnik, golovi, asisti, clean sheet, kartoni, minute, bodovi\n\n### 7. Views za Transfer (Views/Transfer/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List<FantasyFootball.Models.Transfer>\n- Tablica svih transfera: igrac, iz tima, u tim, cijena, datum, status badge (boja po statusu)\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model FantasyFootball.Models.Transfer\n- Breadcrumb\n- Detalji transfera: igrac (link), iz tima (link ili \"Free Agent\"), u tim (link), cijena, datum, status\n\n### 8. Custom Home Page (Views/Home/Index.cshtml)\nDashboard stil. Podaci su u ViewBag:\n- ViewBag.TopPlayers (List<Player> - top 5 po bodovima)\n- ViewBag.Leagues (List<League>)\n- ViewBag.Teams (List<FantasyTeam> - top 5 po bodovima)\n- ViewBag.LatestGameweek (Gameweek objekt)\n- ViewBag.TotalPlayers (int)\n- ViewBag.TotalTeams (int)\n- ViewBag.TotalLeagues (int)\n\nSadrzaj home pagea:\n- Hero sekcija s naslovom \"Fantasy Football\" i kratkim opisom\n- Stats karticce (3 komada): ukupno igraca, timova, liga\n- Top 5 igraca tablica\n- Top 5 timova tablica\n- Latest Gameweek highlights (performanse iz zadnjeg gameweeka)\n- Quick links na sve sekcije\n\n### 9. Obrisi Views/Home/Privacy.cshtml jer vise ne treba\n\n## Model reference (za @model direktive):\n- FantasyFootball.Models.Player (svojstva: Id, FirstName, LastName, FullName, Position, Club, Nationality, DateOfBirth, MarketValue, Goals, Assists, CleanSheets, TotalPoints, FantasyTeams)\n- FantasyFootball.Models.League (Id, Name, Season, CreatedAt, MaxTeams, Description, Teams, Transfers)\n- FantasyFootball.Models.FantasyTeam (Id, Name, OwnerName, CreatedAt, Budget, TotalPoints, Players, League)\n- FantasyFootball.Models.Gameweek (Id, WeekNumber, StartDate, EndDate, Performances)\n- FantasyFootball.Models.MatchPerformance (Id, Player, MatchDate, Opponent, Goals, Assists, CleanSheet, YellowCards, RedCards, MinutesPlayed, PointsEarned)\n- FantasyFootball.Models.Transfer (Id, Player, FromTeam, ToTeam, TransferDate, Price, Status)\n- Position enum: Goalkeeper, Defender, Midfielder, Forward\n- TransferStatus enum: Pending, Accepted, Rejected, Cancelled\n\n## VAZNO:\n- Koristi asp-controller, asp-action, asp-route-id Tag Helpere za linkove\n- NIKADA default Bootstrap izgled ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ sve mora biti custom styled\n- CSS ide u wwwroot/css/site.css\n- Svi Views MORAJU raditi s modelima ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ provjeri @model direktive\n- Koristi @using FantasyFootball.Models u _ViewImports.cshtml ako treba\n",

    "hook_event_name":  "PreToolUse",
    "tool_name":  "Agent",
    "tool_input":  {
                       "description":  "UX designer: create complete Dark Stadium UI",
                       "prompt":  "Ti si UX/UI designer za FantasyFootball ASP.NET MVC aplikaciju. Kreiraj kompletni UI s \"Dark Stadium\" temom.\n\n## Projekt info\n- Radni direktorij: c:/Users/marijan.varivoda/source/FantasyFootball\n- ASP.NET MVC, Razor Views, Bootstrap 5, jQuery\n- Controlleri su vec kreirani: HomeController, PlayerController, LeagueController, FantasyTeamController, GameweekController, TransferController\n- Svaki controller ima Index() i Details(int id) akcije\n- View direktoriji postoje: Views/Player, Views/League, Views/FantasyTeam, Views/Gameweek, Views/Transfer, Views/Home, Views/Shared\n\n## KRITICNO: Anti-Bootstrap-Default Pravila\nNIKADA ne koristiti default Bootstrap izgled. Svaki element MORA biti vizualno customiziran.\nBootstrap koristiti ISKLJUCIVO za grid (row/col), spacing utilities (m-*, p-*), i responsive breakpointe.\nSav vizualni stil (boje, sjene, borderovi, fontovi, animacije) MORA doci iz custom CSS-a u site.css.\n\n## Sto trebas napraviti (SVE - kreiraj sve fajlove):\n\n### 1. Prvo procitaj Views/Shared/_ViewImports.cshtml i Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml.css da razumijes sto vec postoji\n\n### 2. Azuriraj Views/_ViewImports.cshtml ďż˝ďż˝ďż˝ dodaj @using FantasyFootball.Models\n\n### 3. Custom CSS u wwwroot/css/site.css (KOMPLETNO PREPISATI)\n\"Dark Stadium\" tema:\n- :root CSS varijable za boje, spacing, fontove\n- Tamna pozadina #0a0e17 na body, surface #141b2d za kartice\n- Accent: #00f5a0 (neon zelena), #7b61ff (ljubicasta)\n- Tekst: #e2e8f0 (primarni), #64748b (sekundarni)\n- Custom navbar (tamna, backdrop-filter: blur(12px))\n- Kartice: glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur, poluprozirna pozadina, subtle border)\n- Hover na karticama: translateY(-4px), box-shadow s accent bojom\n- Tablice: tamne, accent colored header, hover highlight\n- Gumbi: gradient pozadina (linear-gradient(135deg, #00f5a0, #00d9f5)), crni tekst\n- Position badges: pill oblik, razlicite boje po poziciji (GK plava, DEF zelena, MID ljubicasta, FWD narancasta)\n- Transfer status badges: Accepted zelena, Pending zuta, Rejected crvena, Cancelled siva\n- Tranzicije: transition: all 0.2s ease\n- BEM-like klase: .ff-card, .ff-table, .ff-badge, .ff-hero, .ff-stat-card, .ff-navbar itd.\n- Responsive\n\n### 4. Layout: Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml (PREPISATI)\n- Tamna navbar s neon zelenim logom \"FantasyFootball\"  \n- Nav linkovi: Home, Players, Teams, Leagues, Gameweeks, Transfers\n- Koristiti asp-controller i asp-action Tag Helpere\n- Tamni footer s accent linijom (border-top u accent boji)\n- Dodaj Bootstrap Icons CDN: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css\n\n### 5. Obrisi Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml.css (jer sve ide u site.css)\n\n### 6. Obrisi Views/Home/Privacy.cshtml\n\n### 7. Views za Player (Views/Player/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List\u0026lt;Player\u0026gt;\n- Naslov \"Players\"  \n- Grid kartica (col-lg-4 col-md-6 col-12)\n- Svaka .ff-card: FullName, Club, pozicija badge (.ff-badge), Goals/Assists, TotalPoints, MarketValue\n- Link na Details: asp-controller=\"Player\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@player.Id\"\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model Player\n- Breadcrumb: Home > Players > @Model.FullName\n- Hero (.ff-hero): ime, klub, pozicija, nacionalnost\n- Stats grid (.ff-stat-card): Goals, Assists, CleanSheets, TotalPoints, MarketValue\n- Tablica FantasyTeams: link na FantasyTeam/Details za svaki tim\n\n### 8. Views za League (Views/League/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List\u0026lt;League\u0026gt;\n- Kartice: Name, Season, Description, Teams.Count / MaxTeams\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model League\n- Breadcrumb, info sekcija\n- Standings tablica: rank (po TotalPoints desc), team name (link), owner, points\n- Transfers tablica\n\n### 9. Views za FantasyTeam (Views/FantasyTeam/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List\u0026lt;FantasyTeam\u0026gt;\n- Kartice: Name, OwnerName, League.Name, Budget, TotalPoints\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model FantasyTeam\n- Breadcrumb, hero\n- Liga link, Budget, TotalPoints\n- Players tablica s linkovima\n\n### 10. Views za Gameweek (Views/Gameweek/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List\u0026lt;Gameweek\u0026gt;\n- Kartice: WeekNumber, StartDate-EndDate, Performances.Sum(Goals), Performances.Count\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model Gameweek\n- Breadcrumb, info\n- Performances tablica: Player.FullName (link), Opponent, Goals, Assists, CleanSheet, YellowCards, RedCards, MinutesPlayed, PointsEarned\n\n### 11. Views za Transfer (Views/Transfer/)\n**Index.cshtml** - @model List\u0026lt;Transfer\u0026gt;\n- Tablica: Player.FullName (link), FromTeam?.Name ?? \"Free Agent\" (link ako postoji), ToTeam.Name (link), Price, TransferDate, Status badge\n\n**Details.cshtml** - @model Transfer\n- Breadcrumb, detalji s linkovima\n\n### 12. Custom Home Page (Views/Home/Index.cshtml)\nDashboard. Podaci u ViewBag:\n- ViewBag.TopPlayers (List\u0026lt;Player\u0026gt; top 5), ViewBag.Leagues (List\u0026lt;League\u0026gt;), ViewBag.Teams (List\u0026lt;FantasyTeam\u0026gt; top 5)\n- ViewBag.LatestGameweek (Gameweek), ViewBag.TotalPlayers, ViewBag.TotalTeams, ViewBag.TotalLeagues (ints)\n\nSadrzaj:\n- Hero: \"Fantasy Football 2025/26\" s kratkim opisom\n- 3 stat kartice (Total Players/Teams/Leagues) s ikonama\n- Top 5 Players tablica\n- Top 5 Teams tablica  \n- Latest Gameweek performanse\n- Quick links\n\n## Model reference:\n- Player: Id, FirstName, LastName, FullName, Position(enum), Club, Nationality, DateOfBirth, MarketValue(double), Goals, Assists, CleanSheets, TotalPoints, FantasyTeams(List)\n- League: Id, Name, Season, CreatedAt, MaxTeams, Description, Teams(List), Transfers(List)\n- FantasyTeam: Id, Name, OwnerName, CreatedAt, Budget(double), TotalPoints, Players(List), League\n- Gameweek: Id, WeekNumber, StartDate, EndDate, Performances(List)\n- MatchPerformance: Id, Player, MatchDate, Opponent, Goals, Assists, CleanSheet(bool), YellowCards, RedCards, MinutesPlayed, PointsEarned\n- Transfer: Id, Player, FromTeam(nullable), ToTeam, TransferDate, Price(double), Status(enum)\n- Position: Goalkeeper, Defender, Midfielder, Forward\n- TransferStatus: Pending, Accepted, Rejected, Cancelled\n\nVAZNO: Kreiraj SVE fajlove. Ne preskaci nista. Svaki View MORA imati @model direktivu i koristiti Tag Helpere za linkove.\n"
                   },

class=\"ff-text-accent\">@player.TotalPoints</strong></td>\n                    </tr>\n                    playerRank++;\n                }\n            </tbody>\n        </table>\n    </div>\n}\n\n<!-- Top Teams -->\n@if (topTeams.Any())\n{\n    <h2 class=\"ff-section-title\"><i class=\"bi bi-shield-fill-check\"></i> Top 5 Teams</h2>\n    <div class=\"ff-table-responsive mb-5\">\n        <table class=\"ff-table\">\n            <thead>\n                <tr>\n                    <th>#</th>\n                    <th>Team</th>\n                    <th>Owner</th>\n                    <th>Budget</th>\n                    <th>Points</th>\n                </tr>\n            </thead>\n            <tbody>\n                @{ int teamRank = 1; }\n                @foreach (var team in topTeams)\n                {\n                    <tr>\n                        <td class=\"ff-table__rank\">@teamRank</td>\n                        <td>\n                            <a asp-controller=\"FantasyTeam\" asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"@team.Id\">\n                                @team.Name\n                            </a>\n                        </td>\n                  </tr>\n                    teamRank++;\n                }\n            </tbody>\n        </table>\n    </div>\n}\n\n<!-- Latest Gameweek -->\n@if (latestGameweek != null)\n{\n    <h2 KOMPLETNO prepisati wwwroot/css/site.css\nNovi FPL-inspired CSS:\n- :root varijable: --fpl-purple: #37003c; --fpl-green: #00ff87; --fpl-bg: #f2f2f2; --fpl-white: #fff; --fpl-text: #333;\n- Body: background #f2f2f2, tamni tekst\n- Navbar: background #37003c, bijeli tekst, sticky, bez blur efekta\n- Kartice: bijele, box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), border-radius: 8px, padding\n- Hero sekcije: ljubicasti gradient background, bijeli tekst\n- Tablice: bijele, ljubicasti header (#37003c bijeli tekst), clean rows, hover #f8f8f8\n- Gumbi: primary = ljubicasti (#37003c bijeli tekst), secondary = zeleni (#00ff87 tamni tekst)\n- Position badges: GK #ebff00, DEF #00ff87, MID #05f0ff, FWD #e90052 ÔÇö solid boja, bijeli tekst, pill oblik\n- Transfer status badges: accepted zeleni, pending zuti, rejected crveni, cancelled sivi\n- Footer: #37003c pozadina, bijeli tekst\n- NIKAKAV glassmorphism, backdrop-filter, neon glow ÔÇö cist, solidan dizajn\n- Hover na karticama: subtle shadow increase, transform: translateY(-2px) ÔÇö ne prevelik efekt\n- BEM klase zadrzati (.ff-* prefiks) ali promijeniti stilove\n\n### 2. PREPISATI Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml\n- Navbar: bg #37003c, bijeli brand tekst (ne zeleni), bijeli nav linkovi\n- Footer: bg #37003c, bijeli tekst\n- Ostalo moze ostati isto (container, linkovi, Bootstrap Icons)\n\n### 3. PREPISATI SVE ostale Views da koriste novi stil\nProcitaj svaki od ovih fajlova i prepisai ga:\n- Views/Player/Index.cshtml, Views/Player/Details.cshtml\n- Views/League/Index.cshtml, Views/League/Details.cshtml\n- Views/FantasyTeam/Index.cshtml, Views/FantasyTeam/Details.cshtml\n- Views/Gameweek/Index.cshtml, Views/Gameweek/Details.cshtml\n- Views/Transfer/Index.cshtml, Views/Transfer/Details.cshtml\n\nZa svaki View:\n- Procitaj ga prvo\n- Azuriraj CSS klase i stil da odgovaraju FPL temi (svijetla pozadina, bijele kartice, ljubicasti headeri)\n- Zadrzi istu strukturu podataka i @model direktive\n- Zadrzi iste linkove (asp-controller, asp-action, asp-route-id)\n\n## Model reference (nepromijenjeno):\n- Player: Id, FirstName, LastName, FullName, Position(enum), Club, Nationality, DateOfBirth, MarketValue, Goals, Assists, CleanSheets, TotalPoints, FantasyTeams\n- League: Id, Name, Season, CreatedAt, MaxTeams, Description, Teams, Transfers  \n- FantasyTeam: Id, Name, OwnerName, CreatedAt, Budget, TotalPoints, Players, League\n- Gameweek: Id, WeekNumber, StartDate, EndDate, Performances\n- MatchPerformance: Id, Player, MatchDate, Opponent, Goals, Assists, CleanSheet(bool), YellowCards, RedCards, MinutesPlayed, PointsEarned\n- Transfer: Id, Player, FromTeam(nullable), ToTeam, TransferDate, Price, Status(enum)\n- Position: Goalkeeper, Defender, Midfielder, Forward\n- TransferStatus: Pending, Accepted, Rejected, Cancelled\n\nKREIRAJ SVE FAJLOVE. List<FantasyTeam> _teams;\n\n        public FantasyTeamMockRepository(PlayerMockRepository playerRepo)\n        {\n            var p = playerRepo.GetAll();\n\n            // Helper: find player by Id\n            Player byId(int id) => p.First(x => x.Id == id);\n\n            // ============================================\n            // LIGA 1 ÔÇö \"Premier Fantasy Liga\" (teams 1-5)\n            // ============================================\n\n            // Team 1: Haaland FC ÔÇö napadacki tim oko Haalanda\n            var team1 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 1, Name = \"Haaland FC\", OwnerName = \"Marko\", CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 8, 2), Budget = 2.5, TotalPoints = 1850 };\n            team1.Players.AddRange(new[] {\n                byId(16),  // Ederson (GK)\n (MID)\n                byId(6),   // Saka (MID)\n                byId(2),   // Wirtz (MID)\n                byId(9),   // Palmer (MID)\n                byId(1),   // Haaland (FWD)\n byId(35),  // Mac Allister (MID)\n                byId(34),  // Szoboszlai (MID)\n                byId(44),  // Odegaard (MID)\n                byId(3),   // Salah (FWD)\n                byId(10),  // Isak (FWD)\n            });\n\n            // Team 3: Palmer XI ÔÇö Chelsea + Man City hybrid\n            var team3 = new FantasyTeam { Id = 3, Name = \"Palmer XI\", OwnerName = \"Ivan\", CreatedAt = GetById(int id) => _teams.FirstOrDefault(t => t.Id == id);\n    }\n}\n"

                   },
